content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. User provided updated safe report scenario requirements including a map coordinate selection feature. Confirmed Playwright page inspection and updated JSON scenario file to match actual page elements using accessibility roles (textbox, combobox, button, link) instead of CSS selectors, and added steps for map location search (위치찾기 click → keyword input → search result selection).
2. User debugged Playwright executor strict mode locator errors in 안전신문고 login flow. Fixed multiple button conflicts by using exact CSS selectors: `button[onclick*='LoginUtil.login(1)']` to distinguish login button from survey/query buttons that share similar onclick handlers. Applied fix to all 8 test cases in JSON scenario file.
3. 사용자가 보안 프로그램 다이얼로그 자동 취소 단계를 JSON 테스트 파일에서 삭제하고, Playwright executor의 dialogListener를 수정하여 confirm 다이얼로그는 dismiss하도록 처리했습니다. 이후 iframe 선택자 오류(`iframe[title='우편번호 검색 프레임']` → `"iframe"`)를 JSON에서 수정하여 위치찾기 버튼 클릭 후 새 탭의 iframe을 정상적으로 인식하게 했습니다.

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Developed and debugged Playwright-based test automation for 안전신문고 (Safe Report) Korean government website. Updated test scenario JSON file to use accessibility roles (textbox, combobox, button, link) instead of CSS selectors for better locator stability. Implemented map location search feature with steps for clicking 위치찾기 button, entering keywords, and selecting results. Resolved strict mode locator conflicts in login flow by applying precise CSS selectors like `button[onclick*='LoginUtil.login(1)']` to distinguish login button from similarly-named survey/query buttons, fixing all 8 test cases. Modified Playwright executor's dialogListener to properly dismiss confirm dialogs while handling security program popups. Corrected iframe selector from `iframe[title='우편번호 검색 프레임']` to generic `"iframe"` to properly detect iframe elements in new tabs after button clicks. These changes improved locator reliability and dialog handling in the automated test suite.
</summary>
